Chartered Accountant — Finance & Accounts

We are hiring a CA (or equivalent) to lead day-to-day finance operations, statutory compliance, and management reporting.

Must have:
- CA / CPA / equivalent with 3+ years post-qualification experience
- Strong knowledge of Indian GAAP, tax (GST, TDS), and statutory filings
- Hands-on experience with finalization, audits, and MIS
- Proficiency in Tally / ERP and advanced Excel

Nice to have: manufacturing or retail industry exposure; team mentoring.

Location: India (hybrid). Full-time.
